component.name: Chronicle
component.summary: A self-contained studio for writing novels

description.p: Chronicle is a lightweight, offline-first writing studio for novelists. The desktop app bundles the full Chronicle server and runs it privately on your machine — your manuscripts live in a single local database, and nothing leaves your computer.

ul.li: Distraction-free chapter editor with autocomplete and tense checking
A plugin system for grammar, outlining, proofreading and more
Back up and restore your whole library as a single .chron file

description.p: First desktop release: local single-user Chronicle with .chron backup and restore.
